analysis.root_causes: Inability to identify and use appropriate transition words and conjunctions to connect ideas logically; difficulty constructing proper topic sentences that introduce paragraph content effectively; severe weakness in expository essay writing structure, specifically inability to develop complete multi-paragraph responses with thesis statements and supporting body paragraphs.
analysis.recommended_actions: Assign targeted practice on transition words and conjunctions with explicit instruction on logical relationships between sentences and ideas. Provide structured essay writing practice with scaffolded templates for expository essays, focusing on thesis development and paragraph organization before attempting timed assessments. Implement time management strategies and allow extended time for future assessments to address the consistent rushing pattern that may be contributing to incomplete responses.
